MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present.
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Michael Dabney, is present.
Attorney, Daniel Kassabian, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-07-2010 is vacated.
